bedroom.name: Emersyn's Bedroom
bedroom.tagline: Where dreams, dance moves, and dazzling makeovers come to life!
bedroom.description: A magical pink and purple haven filled with sparkles, Bollywood posters, and everything a 6-year-old superstar needs. The walls are decorated with rangoli stickers and photos from Emersyn's favorite reel videos, while her prized karate belts hang proudly on a special display rack.
bedroom.atmosphere: Cheerful, creative, and bursting with personality - a perfect blend of Indian culture and childhood wonder

time_variants.morning: Golden sunlight streams through the curtains decorated with little diyas, making the glitter on Emersyn's craft table sparkle like magic dust. The room feels fresh and ready for a new adventure!
time_variants.afternoon: The room is bright and lively, perfect for practicing dance moves in front of the ring light or having a pretend makeup session with friends.
time_variants.evening: Warm fairy lights twinkle around the bed frame, and the Bollywood posters seem to glow. It's the perfect time for making reels!
time_variants.night: The glow-in-the-dark rangoli stickers on the ceiling create a peaceful starry pattern. Whiskers is curled up on the bed, and everything feels cozy and safe.

interactive_spots.name: Reel Recording Corner
interactive_spots.description: A special corner with a bright ring light, a tablet stand, and a sparkly backdrop perfect for making dance videos

interactive_spots.name: Makeup Vanity Table
interactive_spots.description: A princess-style table with a heart-shaped mirror, covered in kid-friendly play makeup, nail polish in every color, and sparkly hair accessories

interactive_spots.name: Karate Belt Display
interactive_spots.description: A wooden rack shaped like a lotus flower, proudly displaying all of Emersyn's earned karate belts in order

interactive_spots.name: Cozy Bed with Canopy
interactive_spots.description: A fluffy bed with a sheer canopy, covered in pillows shaped like gol gappe, cotton candy, and french fries

interactive_spots.name: Dress-Up Wardrobe
interactive_spots.description: A magical wardrobe filled with lehengas, tutus, karate gi, and costumes for making the best reels

easter_eggs: A tiny framed photo of Emersyn's first Holi celebration, covered in colorful powder
A secret diary hidden under the mattress with a lock shaped like a mango
A Frooti bottle cap collection in a little box
Whiskers' favorite spot has a tiny cat-sized rangoli mat

kitchen.name: Family Kitchen
kitchen.tagline: Where yummy chai meets crispy gol gappe magic!
kitchen.description: A warm, bustling kitchen filled with the amazing smells of Indian spices and sweet treats. Colorful masala jars line the shelves, the fridge is always stocked with Frooti, and there's a special kid-friendly counter where Emersyn helps make snacks.
kitchen.atmosphere: Warm, aromatic, and full of love - the heart of the home where delicious memories are made

time_variants.morning: The kitchen smells like fresh parathas and chai. Sunlight makes the steel dabba containers shine, and there's a warm glass of milk waiting on Emersyn's special plate.
time_variants.afternoon: Time for snacks! The counter has a plate of freshly made french fries, and there might be popcorn chicken if Emersyn asks nicely.
time_variants.evening: The kitchen is busy with dinner preparations. The smell of spices fills the air, and the mixer grinder whirs as chutneys are made.
time_variants.night: The kitchen is quiet and clean, with only the fridge light glowing. A box of leftover sweets sits on the counter for tomorrow.

interactive_spots.name: Colorful Spice Shelf
interactive_spots.description: Glass jars filled with vibrant turmeric yellow, chili red, and mysterious garam masala, each with a picture label

interactive_spots.name: Frooti Fridge
interactive_spots.description: A big refrigerator covered in alphabet magnets and Emersyn's drawings, always stocked with Frooti mango drinks and yummy leftovers

interactive_spots.name: Gol Gappe Station
interactive_spots.description: A special corner with puris, spicy pani, and all the fillings needed to make the perfect gol gappe

interactive_spots.name: Kid's Cooking Counter
interactive_spots.description: A low counter just Emersyn's height, with safe cooking tools, cookie cutters shaped like diyas, and a tiny apron hook

interactive_spots.name: Chai Corner
interactive_spots.description: A cozy nook where the family chai is made, with a special tiny cup for Emersyn's milk-chai

easter_eggs: A secret stash of candies hidden inside the rice container
Buddy's nose prints on the lower fridge door from sniffing for treats
A 'World's Best Helper' certificate taped to the cabinet, given to Emersyn
A recipe book with Emersyn's crayon additions to make everything 'more yummy'

bathroom.name: Bubble Bathroom
bathroom.description: A bright, cheerful bathroom with ocean-themed tiles and a bathtub perfect for bubble adventures. There's a special step stool with Emersyn's name painted on it, and the mirror has encouraging stickers all around it.
bathroom.atmosphere: Clean, playful, and refreshing - where getting ready becomes an adventure

time_variants.morning: Fresh and bright! The bathroom sparkles clean, and Emersyn's toothbrush is ready in its special holder shaped like a dancing girl.
time_variants.afternoon: Quiet and peaceful, with sunlight making rainbow patterns through the frosted window. Perfect for a quick wash-up after playing.
time_variants.evening: Warm and steamy from bath time! Bubbles pile high in the tub, and all the bath toys are ready for an adventure.
time_variants.night: Soft night-light glowing near the floor, making the bathroom feel safe for late-night trips. Everything is calm and quiet.

interactive_spots.name: Bubble Bath Tub
interactive_spots.description: A big white tub filled with colorful bubbles, bath bombs that fizz in rainbow colors, and floating toys

interactive_spots.name: Sparkle Mirror Station
interactive_spots.description: A mirror surrounded by star and diya stickers, with a special step stool so Emersyn can see herself perfectly

interactive_spots.name: Toothbrush Dance Party
interactive_spots.description: A musical toothbrush holder that plays fun songs for exactly two minutes of brushing time

interactive_spots.name: Towel Hooks
interactive_spots.description: Colorful hooks at kid-height, each with a different animal shape - elephant, peacock, and tiger

interactive_spots.name: Bath Toy Basket
interactive_spots.description: A mesh basket overflowing with boats, cups, squirting fish, and a special mermaid doll

easter_eggs: A tiny rangoli pattern made of bath stickers on the tub floor
Cotton the bunny's picture on the hand soap dispenser
A height chart on the wall showing how much Emersyn has grown
Glow-in-the-dark stars on the ceiling that appear when the lights go off

living_room.name: Family Living Room
living_room.tagline: Where YouTube marathons and family fun happen!
living_room.description: A cozy living room with a big TV perfect for watching YouTube videos, comfortable cushions on the floor for family time, and beautiful Diwali decorations that stay up all year. The walls display family photos and Emersyn's artwork.
living_room.atmosphere: Warm, welcoming, and full of entertainment - the family's favorite gathering spot

time_variants.morning: Sunlight pours through the windows onto the rangoli-patterned rug. The TV is off, and the room feels peaceful and ready for a new day.
time_variants.afternoon: Prime YouTube time! The curtains are drawn just enough to see the TV clearly, and snacks are arranged on the coffee table.
time_variants.evening: The room glows warmly with fairy lights. It's family time, and everyone gathers on the big sofa for stories or videos together.
time_variants.night: Only the TV light flickers in the darkness. The room is quiet except for the show playing, and everything feels cozy and sleepy.

interactive_spots.name: Big Screen TV
interactive_spots.description: A large television mounted on the wall, connected to YouTube and all of Emersyn's favorite channels

interactive_spots.name: Tablet Corner
interactive_spots.description: A cozy bean bag with Emersyn's tablet, perfect for scrolling reels and watching videos up close

interactive_spots.name: Diwali Decoration Wall
interactive_spots.description: A beautiful wall with paper lanterns, toran hangings, and photos from every Diwali celebration

interactive_spots.name: Floor Cushion Circle
interactive_spots.description: Colorful cushions arranged in a circle on a beautiful rug, perfect for sitting with family or playing with pets

interactive_spots.name: Family Photo Gallery
interactive_spots.description: A wall filled with framed photos of family trips, festivals, and Emersyn's achievements including karate ceremonies

easter_eggs: A remote control that plays a tiny Bollywood tune when you find it between cushions
Buddy's favorite chew toy hidden under the sofa
A small mandir (prayer area) in the corner with a kid-made clay Ganesha
Emersyn's first reel playing on a digital photo frame

garden.name: Magical Garden
garden.tagline: Where flowers bloom and bunnies zoom!
garden.description: A beautiful garden filled with marigolds, jasmine, and roses, with a special corner for Cotton the bunny to hop around. There's a rangoli-making area with colored powders and a small vegetable patch where Emersyn helps grow tomatoes and chilies.
garden.atmosphere: Fresh, colorful, and alive with nature - a peaceful outdoor paradise

time_variants.morning: Dewdrops sparkle on flower petals like tiny diamonds. The marigolds are opening up, and Cotton is doing happy morning hops around the garden.
time_variants.afternoon: The garden is warm and sunny. Butterflies dance between flowers, and the jasmine smell is extra strong and sweet.
time_variants.evening: Golden hour makes everything glow beautifully - perfect lighting for garden reels! The flowers are starting to close for the night.
time_variants.night: Fairy lights wrapped around the trees create a magical wonderland. Fireflies might appear, and the garden feels like a secret enchanted place.

interactive_spots.name: Cotton's Bunny Corner
interactive_spots.description: A safe, grassy area with a cute hutch, tunnels, and toys where Cotton the bunny lives and plays

interactive_spots.name: Rangoli Making Space
interactive_spots.description: A flat stone area with containers of colored powders and stencils for making beautiful rangoli designs

interactive_spots.name: Marigold & Jasmine Beds
interactive_spots.description: Rows of bright orange marigolds and fragrant white jasmine, perfect for making flower garlands

interactive_spots.name: Veggie Patch
interactive_spots.description: A small garden bed with tomatoes, green chilies, and herbs that Emersyn helps take care of

interactive_spots.name: Garden Swing
interactive_spots.description: A wooden swing hanging from a big neem tree, decorated with ribbons and bells

easter_eggs: A tiny fairy door at the base of the neem tree
Buddy's buried treasure bone that he keeps forgetting about
A butterfly that seems to follow Emersyn around the garden
Holi color stains on the garden wall from last celebration

school.name: Sunshine School
school.tagline: Where learning is fun and friends are forever!
school.description: A bright, cheerful school with colorful classrooms, a big playground, and wonderful teachers. The walls are covered with student artwork, alphabet charts in English and Hindi, and celebration decorations for every Indian festival.
school.atmosphere: Exciting, educational, and full of friendship - where every day brings new discoveries

time_variants.morning: The school is buzzing with energy as students arrive. The prayer assembly music plays, and everyone is excited to start learning.
time_variants.afternoon: Lunch time! The smell of different tiffins fills the air - parathas, sandwiches, and rice boxes. Friends share and trade snacks.
time_variants.evening: School is ending, and the halls echo with goodbyes. Art projects dry on tables, and the playground has one last burst of energy.
time_variants.night: The school is quiet and closed, with only the security lights on. It's resting and getting ready for another fun day tomorrow.

interactive_spots.name: Colorful Classroom
interactive_spots.description: A bright room with tiny desks, a kind Teacher, alphabet charts, and a reading corner with cushions

interactive_spots.name: Art & Craft Corner
interactive_spots.description: A messy, wonderful space with paints, clay, glitter, and supplies for making beautiful creations

interactive_spots.name: School Playground
interactive_spots.description: A fun outdoor area with slides, monkey bars, and painted games on the ground

interactive_spots.name: Library Corner
interactive_spots.description: Shelves of picture books and story collections, with bean bags for comfortable reading

interactive_spots.name: Festival Stage
interactive_spots.description: A small stage where students perform for Diwali, Holi, and other celebrations throughout the year

easter_eggs: A gold star chart with Emersyn's name having the most stars
Leo's forgotten bookmark in a library book
Ava's glitter that somehow got everywhere and still sparkles
A class photo where everyone is making silly faces

shop.name: Sharma's Corner Shop
shop.tagline: Everything you need and treats you want!
shop.description: A cozy neighborhood shop run by the friendly Shopkeeper, filled with jars of colorful candies, stacks of Frooti boxes, packets of chips, and all sorts of wonderful things. The shop smells like a mix of spices, sweets, and new toys.
shop.atmosphere: Friendly, exciting, and full of treasures - a magical place where pocket money becomes happiness

time_variants.morning: The shop just opened! Everything is neatly arranged, the candy jars are full, and the Shopkeeper is arranging fresh stock with a smile.
time_variants.afternoon: Busy time! Kids from school stop by for snacks. The Frooti fridge is working hard, and the candy jars are getting emptier.
time_variants.evening: The shop glows warmly as the streetlights come on. Families stop by for last-minute groceries, and the Shopkeeper offers samples.
time_variants.night: The shop is closed, shutters down, but the window display still shows off the best candies for tomorrow's customers.

interactive_spots.name: Candy Jar Wall
interactive_spots.description: A whole wall of glass jars filled with every candy imaginable - lollipops, toffees, gummies, and traditional Indian sweets

interactive_spots.name: Frooti & Drinks Fridge
interactive_spots.description: A cold fridge stocked with Frooti mango drinks, lassi bottles, and other refreshing beverages

interactive_spots.name: Snack Shelves
interactive_spots.description: Rows of chips, namkeen, biscuits, and packaged snacks in bright, crinkly packages

interactive_spots.name: Toy Corner
interactive_spots.description: A small section with bubbles, stickers, small toys, and fun things that make perfect treats

interactive_spots.name: Shopkeeper's Counter
interactive_spots.description: A wooden counter where the kind Shopkeeper sits, with a calculator, a bell, and a jar of free eclairs for good kids

easter_eggs: A photo of the Shopkeeper with Emersyn from her first solo shopping trip
A 'Regular Customer' star next to Emersyn's name on a board
A secret stash of extra-special imported candies under the counter
Buddy's paw prints on the floor from when he sneaked in once

playground.name: Rainbow Playground
playground.tagline: Where every game is an adventure!
playground.description: A wonderful neighborhood playground with colorful equipment, soft rubber flooring, and plenty of space to run, play, and make memories. There's always someone to play with, and the ice cream cart visits every evening.
playground.atmosphere: Energetic, joyful, and free - where childhood magic happens every single day

time_variants.morning: The playground is quiet and peaceful, with morning dew on the slides. A few early birds are taking walks, and the equipment sparkles clean.
time_variants.afternoon: Getting busier! School is out and kids are arriving. The energy builds as more friends join in the fun.
time_variants.evening: Peak playground time! Every swing is taken, games are happening everywhere, and the ice cream cart has arrived with its happy jingle.
time_variants.night: The playground rests under streetlights. The swings sway gently in the breeze, waiting for tomorrow's adventures.

interactive_spots.name: Rainbow Slide
interactive_spots.description: A tall, twisty slide painted in all the colors of the rainbow, with a fun climb to the top

interactive_spots.name: Swing Set
interactive_spots.description: Four swings in a row - two regular and two baby swings - perfect for soaring through the air

interactive_spots.name: Monkey Bars
interactive_spots.description: Challenging bars painted like a caterpillar, great for building strength just like in karate

interactive_spots.name: Sandbox Area
interactive_spots.description: A big sandbox with buckets, shovels, and molds for building castles and making sand art

interactive_spots.name: Open Play Field
interactive_spots.description: A grassy area perfect for running, playing catch, practicing karate, or just rolling around

easter_eggs: A heart carved in the big tree with 'E + A BFF' (Emersyn and Ava)
A lucky four-leaf clover patch near the sandbox
The ice cream uncle who remembers everyone's favorite flavor
A hopscotch grid that Emersyn helped paint last summer

park.name: Nehru Garden Park
park.description: A beautiful large park with walking paths, a lotus pond, ancient banyan trees, and lots of space for picnics and play. Families gather here for evening walks, weekend picnics, and festival celebrations like Holi.
park.atmosphere: Serene, natural, and spacious - a green oasis perfect for family time and outdoor fun

time_variants.morning: Joggers circle the paths and yoga groups practice on the grass. The lotus flowers are open, and the park feels fresh and energizing.
time_variants.afternoon: Families spread picnic blankets under shady trees. The gol gappe vendor sets up near the entrance, and kites dot the sky.
time_variants.evening: The park comes alive! Evening walkers fill the paths, the chaat vendors are busy, and kids play until the streetlights come on.
time_variants.night: The park is officially closed, but the moonlight on the lotus pond is magical. Night birds call softly in the ancient trees.

interactive_spots.name: Lotus Pond
interactive_spots.description: A peaceful pond filled with pink and white lotus flowers, with friendly ducks and a small wooden bridge

interactive_spots.name: Banyan Tree Circle
interactive_spots.description: Ancient banyan trees with hanging roots, creating a magical natural playground and shady retreat

interactive_spots.name: Gol Gappe Cart
interactive_spots.description: A colorful cart where a friendly vendor makes the crispiest gol gappe with perfectly spicy pani

interactive_spots.name: Picnic Meadow
interactive_spots.description: A big grassy area where families spread blankets, share food, and enjoy lazy afternoons together

interactive_spots.name: Walking Path
interactive_spots.description: A winding path through the park, lined with flowers and benches, perfect for walks and scooter rides

easter_eggs: A squirrel family that Emersyn has named and visits regularly
The exact spot where the best Holi celebration happened
A wishing well that locals say really works
Cotton candy clouds that look like Emersyn's favorite foods
